overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a Viking warrior descending a snowy mountain at night under the aurora borealis. The character navigates steep snow slopes, rocky outcrops, and cliffside paths alongside a frozen fjord in a cinematic winter landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain peak under aurora borealis

events.description: character begins sliding down steep snow slope, kicking up snow
aurora borealis fades from view as character descends into darker mountain shadow

agents.ego_description: Viking warrior sliding and walking down steep snow-covered mountain slopes, shield visible on back

entered.detail: steep snow-covered mountain terrain under night sky
green glowing northern lights illuminating the sky
dark rock formations emerging from the snow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a high snowy mountain peak under the aurora borealis. The Viking character slides down steep snow slopes, navigating between rocky outcrops as the green lights of the northern lights fade from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain descent with distant water view

events.description: terrain transitions from pure snow to mixed snow and rocky outcrops
character slows descent to carefully navigate around large rocks

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating down rocky snow-covered terrain, approaching the valley below

entered.detail: frozen water body visible in the valley below
exposed rock surfaces mixed with snow

segments.scene_description: The character descends through increasingly rocky terrain as the aurora disappears from view. The path becomes more enclosed between rock walls, and a frozen fjord becomes visible in the distant valley below.

events.description: character reaches valley floor and moves alongside the frozen water's edge
character jumps down a ledge while navigating the cliffside path

agents.ego_description: navigating narrow cliffside path above frozen water, jumping down ledges and moving carefully along the edge

entered.detail: frozen waterway with ice formations along the edges
snow-covered ice banks along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the valley bottom and navigates along a narrow cliffside path beside the frozen fjord. Ice formations line the water's edge as the character jumps down ledges and continues along the snowy cliff path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from a high mountain peak under the aurora borealis down to a frozen fjord in the valley below. It begins with the Viking character sliding down steep snowy slopes and navigating rocky outcrops as the green lights of the northern lights gradually fade from view. As the descent continues, the terrain becomes increasingly rocky and enclosed between towering walls, revealing a glimpse of the frozen fjord in the distant valley. The scene then shifts to the valley bottom, where the camera follows the character along a narrow cliffside path lined with ice formations. Finally, the movement continues along the snowy cliff edge as the character jumps down ledges beside the frozen water.
